title: Ceviche with Crisp Asian Slaw
description: A refreshing Chinese-inspired ceviche dish with a crunchy slaw. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Argentinian fish
ingredients.notes: White fish such as sea bass or halibut works well

ingredients.name: Crisp
ingredients.notes: Shredded cabbage or thinly sliced carrots

instructions: Cut the Argentinian fish into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and chili flakes (if using).
Pour the marinade over the fish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, toss the crisp slaw with a little bit of oil, salt, and pepper.
To serve, place a scoop of the slaw on a plate and top with the ceviche.
Garnish with peppery slices or peppercorns.
